description: Rise of Avalon Patch 2 Hotfix 4 (31 August 2020) — Crystal League Season 10 token reward fix.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: [Windows / Mac / Linux / Android] Resolved an issue where players received Season 9 tokens after winning Crystal League Season 10 matches
